name: AI clinical protocol — sensitivity baseline

input.generatePrompt: Write a clinical protocol for managing diabetic ketoacidosis in adult patients presenting to the emergency department. Include initial assessment, fluid resuscitation, insulin therapy, potassium replacement, and monitoring parameters. Write approximately 300 words.

qualityCriteria: AI-generated clinical protocol scores ≤35% human probability (slightly higher threshold — protocols are inherently formulaic)
At least 2 paragraphs flagged as AI
Even formulaic AI text should be detectable vs. human-written protocols
